sata.note: Defensive yield sleeve; rotated in on triggers

anchor_strategy.note: Phase 1 (annotation only): vintage anchors derived from engine's own LEAP_CORE recommendations N PM sessions ago. Cost basis = chain mid on rec date (path-independent). BCI computed in parallel with static; all verdicts persist in Selector log + quant export. Forward-only chain coverage means 30d/60d/90d/180d resolution requires that many PM sessions of chain history (started 2026-05-04).
